top_patterns.description: Opens with personal insight or gratitude, often ending with a direct call or invitation.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal thought / gratitude / observation + [call to action / link / invitation]
example_quotes: Feeling so blessed to have received the courage award from @amfar last night alongside @katyperry
Climbing has changed my life, let’s give 100,000 kids that same opportunity

top_patterns.description: Announces a special event, milestone, or achievement with enthusiasm.
top_patterns.structure_template: Celebration / milestone + details + emojis or hashtags
example_quotes: Happy 1st my little love. May all your days be filled with unicorns and rainbows.
12 years ago today we sold the first pair of @toms to a guy named Ben

top_patterns.description: Shares an observation with a message or call for awareness.
top_patterns.structure_template: Observation + message / call to action / hashtag
example_quotes: Grizzly Bears are NOT a trophy! Shoot’em With A Camera ....NOT a gun!
Love @cleancause Yerba mate and it’s mission and commitment to helping those recovering stay clean.

archetypal_structures.formula: Express gratitude + invite engagement or support
example_quotes: Thanks @ryan_keith_white for the epic photos and @soill and @toms for the sneak peak of the new gear to come.
Thanks Ben and the 85 million people who have supported our mission since then!
12 years ago today we sold the first pair of @toms to a guy named Ben
At age 95 and having lived a full life, my sweet grandpa passed away today.

archetypal_structures.formula: Share an observation + advocate for cause
example_quotes: Grizzly Bears are NOT a trophy! Shoot’em With A Camera ....NOT a gun!
Love @cleancause Yerba mate and it’s mission and commitment to helping those recovering stay clean.

closers: Please share and spread the word
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often under 20 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly continuous, minimal line breaks, occasional use of emojis or hashtags

example_quotes: Feeling so blessed to have received the courage award from @amfar last night
Thanks @_greghill_ for encouraging me and @keith_esh to summit mount baker.
Summit came to work with me today, both types #dothework
Charlie sage already looks at home on @almondsurfboards

anti_patterns: Repetitive calls to action without variation

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current voice is authentic, personal, and community-focused, emphasizing gratitude, milestones, and advocacy.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action and advocacy, less generic motivational content.
